title: inula racemosa
intro: Inula racemosa, also known as Pukhraj or Duthala, is an herbaceous perennial plant native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like asthma and bronchitis. Inula racemosa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
